chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 267 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. This is second call, it is now 11:35 am. The instant Constitutional Petition is pending since 2022 without any useful progress, as after 02-11-2023 no concrete efforts have been made either by the petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
